title: Migrant Domestic Worker Levy Concession
text:
Migrant Domestic Worker Levy Concession - SupportGoWhere
Migrant Domestic Worker Levy Concession
Share link
Provides concessionary levy at $60 per month if there is an eligible person residing in the household.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Concessionary rate of $60 per month, compared to standard levy of $300 for 1st MDW and $450 for subsequent MDWs
Each household is eligible for one MDW levy concession per eligible person, up to two MDW levy concessions per household
Collapse all sections
About this support

Pay a lower levy of $60 per month if you live with an eligible person

Levy concession can only be granted for one MDW per eligible person and is capped at two levy concessions per household

Who is this for?

If you live with any of the following eligible person who is a Singapore Citizen:

Child below 16 years old

Elderly person who is at least 67 years old

Person with disabilities (PWD):

Must be certified by Singapore-registered doctor to require help with at least 1 activity of daily living (ADL), such as showering, feeding, dressing, toileting, transferring and walking or moving around




If you are a Singapore Citizen who lives with any of the following eligible person who is a Permanent Resident:

Parent, parent-in-law, grandparent or grandparent-in-law at least 67 years old

Parent, spouse, or child with disabilities

How to apply?

No application is needed if:

You or your spouse is at least 67 years old

Your child is below 16 years old




It will automatically start once you meet the eligibility criteria and complete the required steps listed on MOM’s website.




If you were not automatically granted the levy concession, you can submit a form to check why.




Eligible Person

	

Form




Child

	

Check why levy concession for a child was not granted




Elderly or PWD

	

Check why levy concession for an elderly or PWD was not granted

Where can I find help?

For more information that are PWD related: View more details

For more information that are non-PWD related: View more details

For enquiries that are PWD related: 
AIC Hotline: 1800 650 6060

For enquiries that are non-PWD related: 
MOM Hotline: 6438 5122

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

For enquiries that are PWD related: Submit an enquiry

For enquiries that are non-PWD related: Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 25 Feb 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
